query: 在规模top100基金中，业绩最好的10个

args.sql: WITH top100 AS (SELECT fund_code FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) ORDER BY fund_size DESC LIMIT 100) SELECT p.fund_code, p.fund_name, ROUND(p.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS 收益率 FROM fund_performance p JOIN top100 t ON p.fund_code = t.fund_code WHERE p.period = '本年以来' ORDER BY p.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10

plan.rationale: Get top 100 funds by latest size, then join with performance for default period and select top 10 by return

generated_sql_result.fund_name: 景顺长城景颐双利债券(A类)

notes: Latest fund size date is used
Performance period defaults to '本年以来'
Get top 100 funds by latest size, then join with performance for default period and select top 10 by return
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。
